creator: yusufg@outblaze.com
text:
phk has committed his paper on jail to FreeBSD-current
I have requested him to MFC this paper. His reply is that he has no -stable
machine and no time to MFC this paper.
However he has graciously given permission for someone else to MFC this 
paper. 

I believe this paper could reach a wider audience by MFC'ing it

Fix: 

Some CVS magic which should be obvious to someone who has done a MFC :-)
How-To-Repeat: N/A
